eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Wayne, MI; at 11:39 AM ON MAR 6, 2026 Effective until 12:39 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: THIS IS AN UPDATE. The Wayne County Department of Homeland Security and Emergency Management has closed the Required Monthly IPAWS Test. THIS WAS ONLY A TEST. Had this been an actual emergency, recommended actions would have followed. No response is required.
